rationale: Stale code-index resync (C) is the upstream cause. All prior findings for A/B depend on accurate index data. Delaying C risks irreversible constitutional violations via contaminated verdicts.
risk_if_other_side_wins: Unsynced code-index creates attack surface for undetected state divergence, compromising constitutional grounding principles across all products.
